text:
ymniam-orch is the 3rd track on the original soundtrack of the film Attack on Titan Part 1: Guren no Yumiya. It is also the 13th track on disc 1 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 2 Original Soundtrack.

As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Title

The title refers to the fact that the track is a orchestral arrangement on YAMANAIAME.

Musical motifs

The track is a remix of YAMANAIAME.
